race.description: Hahn Superdry 3.5 Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: MANOORA (9) is resuming from a spell of 18 months and having her first run for the Brett Robb yard. Every chance she needs this hitout off such a long break but she does take benefit from a trial win. Will need a smart steer from out there but her Vic figures suggest she's more than capable. TASSORTS PRIDE (12) is a Tassort gelding on debut for the Northam yard that showed encouraging signs in his Scone trial win. The betting will hold the key. LOVELY LENI (8) is a Magna Grecia filly also on debut and has trialled up well. Gets in well with the 1.5kg claim and is in the mix. HARRY (1) has been knocking on the door throughout this prep and deserves his chance with JPH back in the saddle.
